'''Ord Mynock Freeport''' was the only [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Ord Mynock/Legends|Ord Mynock]]. It was originally part of the protective fortress built by the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] early settlers, which became a bustling modern spaceport. Ord Mynock Freeport had a variety of goods, services, specialists, mechanics, and other businesses. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] reported that their regulations were a little lax in the Freeport due to Ord Mynock's distance from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]].<ref name="GTLAA" />

Since the terrain was so muddy, the Freeport was built on air-filled caissons to prevent it from sinking into the mire.<ref name="GTLAA" />
